name: Pink Camera Case - heyday™
description:
The Pink Camera Case from heyday™ offers a stylish and functional solution for protecting your camera. With dimensions of 146mm in height and 127.2mm in width, it provides ample space for your camera and accessories. This multicolored case is designed to be a reliable companion for your photography needs. It includes a camera strap, ensuring easy portability and accessibility for your camera equipment.

heyday™: Let your style speak volumes.
